overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character crossing a neon-lit urban intersection at night. The character navigates through moderate futuristic vehicle traffic across a wide yellow-striped crosswalk, then continues along the sidewalk past other pedestrians in a dense cyberpunk cityscape filled with holographic billboards and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with neon signage and heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: red futuristic truck drives past from right to left across the crosswalk
black futuristic car with glowing accents passes from left to right in front of the character
large silver truck drives across the crosswalk from right to left, temporarily blocking the path

agents.ego_description: character running across the wide yellow-striped crosswalk, navigating between futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan with illuminated headlights driving across the intersection
large silver truck passing in front of the character, temporarily obscuring the view

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying a face with yellow background and purple border
bright purple neon sign with asian characters on the building facade
wide pedestrian crossing with bold diagonal yellow stripes and red text markings
tall illuminated glass and steel towers rising in the background with various lights

segments.scene_description: The character begins crossing a wide neon-lit intersection in a cyberpunk city. A large digital billboard with a face dominates the left side while purple neon signage glows on the right. The character dodges a black car and silver truck while running across the yellow-striped crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city crosswalk nearing the far sidewalk

events.description: teal sports car with white wheels drives past from left to right across the crosswalk
character slows down and steps onto the far sidewalk, completing the street crossing

agents.ego_description: character continuing across the intersection, slowing as a teal sports car passes, then stepping onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: teal retro-futuristic sports car with white wheels driving across the crosswalk

entered.detail: futuristic black vehicle parked at the curb with glowing headlights

segments.scene_description: The character nears the end of the crosswalk as a teal sports car drives past. The digital billboard recedes into the distance on the left. The character steps onto the far sidewalk next to a parked black vehicle, leaving the main traffic lane.

events.description: camera turns left to follow the street direction, revealing the sidewalk ahead
other pedestrians appear walking toward the camera, including a person with red hair

agents.ego_description: character walking along the city sidewalk, passing other pedestrians including a person with red hair and a woman in a white suit

notable_agents.action: person with bright red hair wearing a gray suit walking toward the camera
woman in a white suit crossing the street toward the camera

entered.detail: green and brown building corner with vertical digital signage
suspended traffic light showing red signal over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk, turning left to follow the street. The crosswalk falls behind as other pedestrians approach, including a distinctive figure with red hair. The environment shifts from the open intersection to a more enclosed street canyon with building facades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit urban intersection into the enclosed corridor of a dense cyberpunk street. It begins with the character sprinting across a yellow-striped crosswalk, dodging a black car and a silver truck beneath the glow of a massive digital face and purple signage. As the character nears the edge of the intersection, a teal sports car streaks past and the large billboard recedes into the distance. The scene then shifts as the character steps onto the far sidewalk beside a parked black vehicle, leaving the open traffic lanes behind. Finally, the camera follows the character turning left to walk along the sidewalk, where the open vista of the crossing is replaced by towering building facades and approaching pedestrians, including a figure with red hair.
